subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Grievous afflictions have befallen thee, and thou hast endured mighty tribulations and borne the derision and reproach of the opponents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی صدمات شدیده دیدی و مشقات عظیمه کشیدی و بشماتت و ملامت اعدا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
